Fighter.name: Fighter
Fighter.description: Punch your way to victory! Fighters are great at doing big strong melee attacks and smashing things to pieces!

Hunter.name: Hunter
Hunter.description: Shoot things from afar! Hunters are great at hitting things from a distance while staying out of danger themselves!

Mage.name: Mage
Mage.description: Blast your foes! Mages are great at casting all sorts of crazy spells and dealing elemental damage!

Medic.name: Cleric
Medic.description: Be the best friend! Clerics are great at keeping your team alive and helping them recover from taking hits!

Tank.name: Tank
Tank.description: Get in the way! Tanks are great at absorbing damage and pushing enemies around!

Thief.name: Thief
Thief.description: Attack from the shadows! Thiefs are great at evading hits, collecting coins, and striking from behind!

Monk.name: Monk
Monk.description: A versatile combat master! Monks can switch between ranged and melee stances and attack twice per turn!

Butcher.name: Butcher
Butcher.description: Meat Meat Meat Meat Meat! Butchers are great at cleaving chunks of meat off of things and have a hook to pull stuff towards them!

Druid.name: Druid
Druid.description: One with nature! Druids are great at summoning animal friends and come with a special Crow counterpart!

Tinkerer.name: Tinkerer
Tinkerer.description: A crafty inventor! Tinkerers are great at crafting temporary weapons and using all sorts of crazy gadgets!

Necromancer.name: Necromancer
Necromancer.description: Rise from the dead! Necromancers are great at playing with corpses and leeching life from enemies!

Psychic.name: Psychic
Psychic.description: Clear your mind! Psychics are great at manipulating things from afar and moving objects with their minds! Psychics also have +5 starting mana.

Jester.name: Jester
Jester.description: You can be anything! Jesters have no limits!
